title: tephroseris helenitis var. pyrenaica
intro: Tephroseris helenitis var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Pyrenees region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which can help to boost the immune system, protect against oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Pyrenean Mountain Everlasting can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
